title: Academicals
description: Making armor into academicals (academic costumes). Made by gfdsggafg.
body:
# Academicals
### Making armor into academicals (academic costumes, Chinese standard). Made by gfdsggafg.  

Firstly made in 2020 for a graduation party in Minecraft.\
皮革帽子-学位帽，颜色为流苏颜色（黑色-学士、蓝色-硕士、红色-博士）\
皮革上衣-垂布+学位服袖子，颜色为垂布颜色（粉色-文学类、黄色-工学类、灰色-理学类、绿色-农学、白色-医学、红色-军事学）\
不同护腿-学位服长袍（链甲-学士、铁甲-硕士、金甲-博士、钻石甲-导师）

因为本人技术水平限制，学位服只能做成袖子统一黑色，因此不太符合标准款式。请见谅。

### For the commands to use, see 'commands_before_1.17.txt' or 'commands_after_1.17.txt', according to the game's version.
### To know about the background of the pack, see 'background.txt'.
